subject: Coating Metal Energy — a silver chrome energy sphere with a metal-type symbol at its center against a dark space background
description: A large chrome-silver sphere is centered in the frame, bearing the steel/metal type symbol embossed or inlaid on its surface. The orb has a reflective metallic quality with bright highlights suggesting a polished surface. The background is dark with scattered light sparks or energy particles radiating outward, giving a space or void atmosphere. The composition is a pure object close-up — abstract elemental iconography for the metal energy type.
foreground: Chrome silver energy sphere with metal-type symbol
background: Dark void with scattered light sparks
